# Code of conduct

Keivotos contributors and maintainers are expected to be respectful, patient,
and constructive. Discuss the work, not the person; accept correction; avoid
harassment, threats, discrimination, doxxing, or publication of private data.

Maintainers may edit, reject, or remove contributions and participation that
violate these expectations. Serious conduct concerns should be reported through
a private maintainer contact when available, not litigated through public issue
threads.
